curation_notes: Patch commit is the merge commit of PR #41681 into the release branch. The vulnerability is a TOCTOU race condition in the signupAndLoginSuper() method in UserSignupCEImpl.java, where a non-atomic check (isUsersEmpty()) followed by user creation allows concurrent requests to bypass the single-admin restriction. The fix adds an atomic sentinel document claim via MongoDB findAndModify with upsert. The patch touches 6 non-test source files (1 new migration, 4 new method additions across interfaces/impls, 1 core fix in UserSignupCEImpl.java), making it noisy. The primary location is UserSignupCEImpl.java::signupAndLoginSuper, as that is where the vulnerable non-atomic check-then-act pattern exists. The pre-assigned vulnerability class race-condition (from CWE-367) is correct.
